component.name: Label Printer
Impresora de Etiquetas
component.summary: Design and print TSPL labels for HT300 (HPRT) printers
Diseña e imprime etiquetas TSPL para impresoras HT300 (HPRT)

description.p: Label Printer is a desktop application for designing and printing labels using TSPL commands on HPRT HT300 thermal printers.
Label Printer es una aplicación de escritorio para diseñar e imprimir etiquetas usando comandos TSPL en impresoras térmicas HPRT HT300.

ul.li: Visual label editor with real-time preview
TSPL code editor with bidirectional sync
Barcodes (Code 128, Code 39, EAN-13) and QR codes
Multiple connection modes: CUPS, Network TCP, USB direct
12+ ready-to-use templates for products, shipping, warehouse
Export and print with configurable speed and density

description.p: Connection settings (CUPS, Network TCP, USB), bug fixes, real templates.
Initial release with TSPL editor, visual preview, and HT300 support.
